rules: Never use Inter or generic sans for headings.
Use tight line-height (leading-none) for headings, loose (leading-relaxed) for body.
Overlines/Labels MUST be Uppercase + Tiny + Wide Spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Tint neutral greys slightly to make them feel alive.
Never use pure black or pure white backgrounds.
Interactive elements must have 3:1 contrast against adjacent colors.
Every pixel must be utilized in the Control Room grid.
Containers with borders must have internal padding.

components.header: Crystal Glass - backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0A0B]/60 with 1px delicate inner stroke (border-white/10).
components.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-white/10), no shadow. Hover: border color brightens, subtle shadow.
components.compiler: Retro-Futurism / Terminal Look. Deep black background, subtle neon accents, scanlines or mono typography.
components.buttons: Neumorphic tactile or crisp flat with 1px border. Explicit hover states.

rules: Minimalist animations — use micro-interactions for feedback.
Hover states on all interactive elements.
Transition effects for smooth state changes (e.g., transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Pure HTML + Tailwind CSS for structure and layout (Grid, Containers).
Use pure Radix/Shadcn UI for logic components (Select, Tabs, Dialogs) but strip generic styling to match the technical theme.
Use Recharts for Performance & Cost Graphs.
For the Self-Healing Loop Visualization, use 3 interconnected cards (Observer, Planner, Healer) with animated SVG arrows or borders (Tracing Beam style).
For the Verifiable Ledger Timeline, use a vertical list with left-bordered dots connecting each event.
For the Deploy Wrapper, simulate a terminal with a dark background and green/white monospaced text output.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
Ensure navigation bar is visible on desktop, not hidden behind a hamburger.

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react for all standard icons. For highly technical visuals, build SVG diagrams inline.

media.instructions: No external images used. Rely on typography, grid structures, and CSS patterns (like subtle radial gradients or grid backgrounds) to provide visual interest.
